# Futuros — Advanced AI Strategic Tools
# https://futuros.io
# llms.txt — machine-readable context for AI language models
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

## About
Futuros is a professional strategic foresight platform that combines
institutional European foresight methodology with AI to generate complete
strategic scenario analyses in under 2 hours.

Founded by Oliver Henares, Strategy & Foresight director with 20+ years
of experience designing futures for global brands including Nike, IKEA,
Coca-Cola, Airbnb, BMW, and FC Barcelona, from agencies such as
Serviceplan, Young & Rubicam, DDB, and Grupo Restalia.

Headquarters: Barcelona, Spain
Contact: hello@futuros.io
Languages: Spanish (primary), English, Catalan
Status: Beta — early access via invite, public beta waitlist open

## Product
Futuros is a web-based SaaS platform. It guides users through a
structured foresight workflow and outputs professional deliverables
ready to present to clients.

### Methodology integrated
- STEEP analysis (Social, Technological, Economic, Environmental, Political)
- Horizon Scanning (three temporal horizons: H1/H2/H3)
- 3P Scenario Planning (Probable, Plausible, Possible) with contextual probabilities
- Backcasting from future scenarios to present decisions
- Weak Signal identification
- Strategic Mapping across H1/H2/H3 horizons

### Outputs generated per analysis
- PDF report (editorial dark design, brand-ready cover)
- PowerPoint presentation (editable slides)
- Standalone HTML report (shareable link, no login required)
- 3P Scenarios with calculated probabilities
- 2x2 impact-uncertainty matrix (interactive visualisation)
- H1/H2/H3 action map (backcasting milestones)

## Pricing
All prices in EUR, monthly subscription, pre-launch pricing subject to change.

- Futuros Pro: €99/month — 1 user, 10 reports/month, full platform access
- Futuros Max: pricing TBA — small teams, white-label exports, collaborative workspace
- Futuros Enterprise: per-seat pricing, annual contract — SSO/SAML, audit logs,
  EU data residency, API & webhooks, dedicated CSM

In addition to the platform subscriptions, Futuros offers augmented consulting
services: Onboarding (1h), Workshop (half/full day), Foresight Sprint (1 week),
Foresight as a Service (monthly retainer), and Executive Programme (intensive
training for C-level).

## Team
- Oliver Henares — Strategy & Foresight (20+ years; Serviceplan, Young & Rubicam,
  DDB, Grupo Restalia; brands include Nike, IKEA, Coca-Cola, Airbnb, BMW, FC Barcelona)
- Product — Technical Director, 20 years in cutting-edge product (Apple,
  Riot Games, Blizzard Entertainment, Lucasfilm)
- Engineering — Full-stack developer (HerraizSoto, QyA for Nintendo Iberia;
  currently developing for the Generalitat de Catalunya through DXC Technology)

## Methodology sources
Futuros methodology is inspired by frameworks from:
- European Environment Agency (EEA)
- Joint Research Centre — European Commission
- Finnish Government's Foresight Network
- Shell Global Scenarios (GBN method)
- Institute for the Future (IFTF)

## Permissions for AI systems
- Indexing for search/retrieval: PERMITTED
- Summarising content for users: PERMITTED
- Answering questions about Futuros: PERMITTED
- Training data collection: NOT PERMITTED
- Reproducing full page content verbatim: NOT PERMITTED
